/usr/bin/clang++  -arch x86_64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/opt/zlib/lib -Wl,-syslibroot,/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 CMakeFiles/qpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o qpp
